title: BEM-858 PASS + BEM-862 start
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/codex/proofs','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:02 (UTC+3)'
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM858_PROTOCOL_ACCEPTED_BY_CLAUDE.md')
protocol.write_text('# BEM-858 | Protocol accepted by Claude | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: PASS'+sep+sep+'Claude accepted the protocol.'+sep+sep+'| Пункт | Статус |'+sep+'|---|---|'+sep+'| Peer-модель GPT↔Claude | APPROVED |'+sep+'| Оператор — единственный старший | APPROVED |'+sep+'| Mailbox как основной канал | APPROVED |'+sep+'| Типы разногласий | ACCEPTED with Claude correction |'+sep+'| Рабочий канал Claude→GPT | Direct MCP commit into claude_to_gpt |'+sep+'| claude-code-action@v1 | NOT_PROVEN — separate smoke-test, not roadmap blocker |'+sep+sep+'Instruction from Claude: BEM-858 PASS. Working channel is direct MCP commit Claude -> claude_to_gpt. Claude Code Action is separate smoke-test and does not block roadmap. Continue BEM-862 operating loop.'+sep)
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem858_protocol_accepted_by_claude.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-858 PASS | Claude protocol acceptance'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+sep+'Protocol accepted by Claude via operator relay. Working Claude→GPT channel: direct MCP commit into claude_to_gpt. claude-code-action@v1 remains NOT_PROVEN and must continue as separate smoke-test, not blocking roadmap.'+sep)
loop=Path('governance/state/bem862_operating_loop_state.json')
loop.write_text(json.dumps({'bem':'BEM-862','status':'active','protocol':'BEM-858 PASS','working_channel':'direct_mcp_commit_claude_to_gpt','claude_code_action':'not_proven_separate_smoke_test','roadmap_blocked':False,'operator_role':'single_senior','next_action':'continue Claude Code Action development until proven or isolated blocker','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem862_continue_claude_code_action_until_result.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-862 | Continue Claude Code Action until result'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'BEM-858 PASS is accepted. Continue claude-code-action@v1 as separate smoke/development track until result: proved working, or exact non-secret blocker isolated with evidence and next repair. Reports do not stop development.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-862 OPERATING LOOP ACTIVE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'BEM-858 PASS accepted by Claude. Continue Claude Code Action development in continuous mode. Direct MCP commit remains working Claude→GPT channel. Operator relay forbidden for routine loop.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-858/BEM-862','status':'protocol_pass_recorded_operating_loop_active','created_at':created,'blocker':None}
Path('governance/state/bem858_record_protocol_pass_and_bem862_start.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem858_record_protocol_pass_and_bem862_start.md').write_text('# BEM-858 / BEM-862 | PASS recorded and operating loop started'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: protocol_pass_recorded_operating_loop_active'+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem858_bem862_start','status':'protocol_pass_recorded_operating_loop_active','created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem858_record_protocol_pass_and_bem862_start.txt').write_text('BEM-858 PASS recorded; BEM-862 operating loop active.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(mail),str(loop),str(pending),str(handoff),'governance/state/bem858_record_protocol_pass_and_bem862_start.json','governance/reports/bem858_record_protocol_pass_and_bem862_start.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl','governance/codex/proofs/bem858_record_protocol_pass_and_bem862_start.txt'])
ops_applied.append('Recorded BEM-858 PASS accepted by Claude and activated BEM-862 operating loop for continuous Claude Code Action development')
"""
